content.situation: Your colleague is giving you instructions on how to submit a report through the company portal. You want to confirm you understood the steps correctly.
content.speakerText: First, log in with your employee ID, then upload the file in PDF format, and finally click submit.
content.speakerTextCn: 首先用你的员工ID登录，然后上传PDF格式的文件，最后点击提交。
content.responseTemplate: So, log in with my ID, upload as PDF, and then ___—got it!
content.hint: Use the exact verb from the instruction to show you're repeating accurately.
content.knowledgePoint: 复述关键动作动词短语以确认理解

content.situation: Your manager is explaining how to join a virtual meeting. You want to make sure you didn't miss any step.
content.speakerText: Open the email, find the meeting link, click it five minutes before the start, and turn on your microphone only when speaking.
content.speakerTextCn: 打开邮件，找到会议链接，开始前五分钟点击它，只有在说话时才打开麦克风。
content.responseTemplate: Okay, so open email, find the link, click it early, and ___ only when I talk—understood.
content.hint: Use the precise phrase from the instruction—don’t paraphrase when confirming steps.
content.knowledgePoint: 准确复述操作指令中的关键动词短语

content.situation: A customer service rep is guiding you through resetting your home Wi-Fi router. You’re repeating the steps to confirm.
content.speakerText: Unplug the power cable, wait 30 seconds, plug it back in, and wait until the lights turn steady green.
content.speakerTextCn: 拔掉电源线，等待30秒，再插回去，等指示灯变成稳定的绿色。
content.responseTemplate: So, unplug it, wait a bit, plug it back, and wait for the lights to turn ___—got it.
content.hint: The color and state of the lights are part of the exact instruction—repeat them precisely.
content.knowledgePoint: 复述状态描述词以确认细节理解
